ops.body: Lab fully retired 2026-07-14 (user directive): the E13 dual-shadow nightly replay agent (com.cc-steer.replay) is stopped — no further ledger collection. The ledger to date is preserved read-only at /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-lab/results/E13/ledger.db (final commit 378f58b; tree is chmod -R a-w, see its CLAUDE.md). adapters/ deleted (regenerable from committed recipes+seeds on Tinker). Any E14 / judged-gating follow-up builds in the cc-steer package against the frozen eval store, reading lab artifacts as archive inputs only.
